1.description: retrieve Drammen municipality geometry for spatial filtering

2.description: retrieve 200-year flood zones intersecting Drammen municipality

3.description: retrieve parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m² intersecting 200-year flood zones

4.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard zones intersecting Drammen municipality

5.description: calculate distance from each parcel to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

6.description: aggregate to one row per parcel with minimum distance to quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: sort parcels by distance to quick-clay hazard zone ascending
